history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B, facing right. The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward to row 02 column C is safe, and this path can continue around the lava at column C in rows 03 and 04 by going along the top row first.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 02 column C, facing right. The goal is at row 04 column D. The cell ahead at row 02 column D is safe, and moving there helps me bypass the lava below in column C before turning downward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D, facing right. The cell ahead at row 02 column E is a wall, so I should not move forward. To reach the goal at row 04 column D, I need to face downward and then move toward it. Turning right from facing right will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D, now facing down. The cell ahead at row 03 column D is floor and safe. Moving forward brings me closer to the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D, facing down. The cell ahead at row 04 column D is the goal, so moving forward will reach it safely.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
